name: Sammy Rivers
learned: Sammy Rivers is the de facto leader of the group of teenagers, often taking charge during their mysterious adventures. While brave, Sammy is sometimes reluctant to embrace the full weight of leadership. Sammy is a natural at keeping the group together, even when fear and doubt begin to creep in.
currently: Sammy Rivers is currently leading the group in their investigation into the dimensional gateways hidden within their town. Despite initial reluctance, Sammy is gradually stepping into a leadership role, ensuring the team stays focused on stopping the evil force from entering their world.
lifestyle: Sammy wakes up early to get a head start on the day, checking in with friends about the next steps in their investigation. After school, Sammy spends time researching local lore and organizing their plans for exploring strange places around town. In the evenings, Sammy meets with the group to discuss new developments and prepare for the next adventure.
